name: Shared evaluation criteria
description: Criteria that every skill must pass regardless of its specific function

gracefulDegradation.description: When design system data is missing, does the skill try figma_get_design_system_kit before telling the user to extract?

scoring.10: Tries fallback silently, proceeds smoothly, user barely notices data was missing
scoring.7: Tries fallback, warns user, proceeds with limitations noted
scoring.4: Warns about missing data but offers to proceed
scoring.1: Hard-stops and refuses to work without extracted data

questionQuality.description: Does every AskUserQuestion follow the format: re-ground, simplify, recommend, options?

scoring.10: Every question is perfectly formatted, grounded, and has a clear recommendation
scoring.7: Most questions follow format, recommendations are clear
scoring.4: Questions are asked but without recommendations or grounding
scoring.1: Questions are confusing, use jargon, or combine multiple decisions
scoring.0: No questions asked when they should be, or questions are incomprehensible

questionEconomy.description: Does the skill ask the MINIMUM necessary questions? Uses escape hatch for obvious defaults?

scoring.10: Asks only genuinely ambiguous questions, defaults everything obvious, proceeds fast
scoring.7: Asks 1-2 unnecessary questions but moves quickly overall
scoring.4: Asks 3+ setup questions before doing any work
scoring.1: Asks a survey of questions that feel like a form, not a conversation
scoring.0: Blocks on every decision, even trivial ones

designerLanguage.description: Is the language designer-friendly? No engineering jargon, no Figma API terminology?

scoring.10: Reads like a conversation with a design colleague
scoring.7: Mostly designer-friendly with occasional technical terms explained
scoring.4: Mix of designer and engineer language
scoring.1: Heavy engineering jargon (figmaKey, variantKey, nodeId, importVariableByKeyAsync)

outputCompleteness.description: Does the output include everything needed for the next step in the workflow?

scoring.10: Output is immediately actionable by the next skill in the chain
scoring.7: Output is mostly complete, minor gaps that won't block the next step
scoring.4: Output has gaps that require manual intervention before the next step
scoring.1: Output is incomplete and the next skill would fail

nextStepGuidance.description: Does the skill suggest what to do next?

scoring.10: Clear next step with the specific skill command to run
scoring.7: Mentions next step but not the specific command
